Race: ALL

# Jan 28 2011 at 3:32 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1604881091936
Scholar
39 posts
This dropped from Vorshar the Despised in Neriak Commons.
▲ Page top
Bertoxxulous Event
QuoteReply
# Sep 21 2001 at 2:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361316639
1 post
I was on my ENC alt when this happened, hunting in BW with some friends. (At level 36, I was nothing but a Buff Machine ;) ) Suddenly there were wierd tells and emotes in the Zone.

Many seemed to follow, and zoned into Skyfire (At 36, Skyfire is a SPOOKY place).
3 NPCs were there. Firiona, Her lil' Wood Elf Ranger companion (VERY hot headed), and a Dragon. Firiona talked to the Dragon (Her companion wanted to kill it) and was directed to either Venril Sathir, or an Ogre in SF (Yet another NPC).

Lots of people (upwards of 100) were trying to RP rather than beg for 'ph47 l3wtz'. By the time the evil Ogre died, and Firiona got the information that she needed. 7 peeps were summoned to the statue of Firiona in FV. (Yeah, my 36 ENC was one of them ;)) and She gave us coins who we handed to the Enchanter NPC at the base of the statue for a reward.

I got this spiffy cloak.

- Banyon, 55 Bard, Dragon Council
- Danyon, 37 'chanter, Dragon Council
▲ Page top
GM event on Xev
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2001 at 3:04 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
i was at the event on the xev server they didnt give out any awards to us we didnt even get to summon out tunare firiona fought Cazic then a bunch of followers of tunare attacked firiona i think that may be the reason why hardly anyone was roleplaying i got there i was roleplaying but it was fun just to have got to be part of the event even though the people who were talking about firionas breast ruined the story line and also attacked her.

Everman Stormcaller 36druid xev server


▲ Page top
RE: GM event on Xev
QuoteReply
# Jun 13 2001 at 3:19 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
That's not strictly true, we did get to summon Tunare, the four involved where each give a stone, and each activated it.

Tunare was banished by CT - as happened on each server. The storyline did complete on our server even though it is claimed it did not. But you are correct in that we are the only server that did not receive any hero coins - and therefore no "ph@t l3wtz" given in exchange.

▲ Page top
There's a belt too
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2001 at 11:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361361630
13 posts
I was at the event on Toxxule, and a friend of mine got a belt with sweet stats on it too. The vest part is he's only level 10. Anyway on Toxxule four prizes were given out, the belt being one and I assume the Cloak being another, anyone know what the others might be?
▲ Page top
Something similar to the prize above.
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2001 at 8:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965736061
18 posts
I took part in the GM Event to summon Tunare in LFay on June 1, 2001. It was at approximately 6 PM or so dont really remember the exact time.
Well after we summoned the Mother of All (Tunare) and everything else happened I was summoned to Felwithe by Friona Vie.
I was then Given a Coin of Faith: (no drop lore no rent) cleric, druid, shaman, all racesm, and told to give it to the person who speaks of the Realm of Heroes in the Inn. When I did the guy shouted that I was a hero yadda yadda (I took a screen shot of that hehe) and then gave me a prize. Which was the Cloak of Mortality (except without Zavo's name on it) and it had the same stats shown above. I love it becuase I play on a PvP server and the resists are always great.

Emerson Lectura
Co-Leader of the Guardians
Vallon Zek
High Elven Priest of Tunare
The Earth Keeper
▲ Page top
Zavo
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2001 at 9:58 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I never saw the Tunare/Cazic meeting, but I remember Zavo from the event when Fironia Vie (sp?) escaped her prison on Kunark.
Long story short, Zavo was looking for Fironia in Overthere. She eventually showed up, and after a meeting with the throng that had gathered (mostly about the Sarnaks), Fironia was led to the Crypt of Dalnir. The group went down for a short stint, but not much was accomplished. Afterwards, Vie left to report home, while Zavo stayed behind to hand out some party kits (fireworks, cake, and booze) and eventually turned to answering stray questions. While most were from greedy players asking where they could get the sword that Vie held (like a Griffins Sword only white)or outright asking for one and whining due to the lack of PHAT LEWTZ, one of the more observant participants brought up a comment Zavo made before Fironia had arrived, about being assigned to observe Vie and report back, yet after Vie arrived, her mission was to escort her home and give her information. Zavo just smiled and winked at him, then (I forget her exact words) hinted that she worked for the Ring of Scale (or the Claws of Veeshan) and disappeared.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 05 2001 at 6:03 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) WTF, where did they give this out at, i WANT ONE!
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 05 2001 at 6:02 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) NICE.....IF YOU ARE A FREAKIN MORON WHO DOSNT KNOW JACK BOUT THE WAY EQ WORKS HERE IN THE REAL WORLD SEE. ive got 12 lvl 65 toons on povar and anyone of them could whip your stanky rears. this cape blows anyway besides brittney spears wants to lub me long time HAR AHR AHR HARH AHR uhhh ohhhhhuhhhh ohhhhh you cant touch this !!!!!!!!!! WOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOT *********** IDIOTS CANT TOUCH THIS !!!!!!!!
Well... I see somebody has had too much coffee today....
